user.title: Shelly Advanced
user.description: Keep a roaming Shelly's config entry in sync with wherever it is reachable — directly on the main network, or behind another Shelly acting as a WiFi range extender.

manual.title: Add a single Shelly
manual.description: Pick the Shelly to manage. Its address is taken from the Shelly integration. The extender is optional — leave it blank to auto-detect it (all other Shellies are scanned when the device is not directly reachable).

data.extender_host: Extender host (optional — blank = auto-detect, or pin one e.g. shelly-yyy.lan)

discover.title: Discover Shellies
discover.description: Select the Shelly devices to follow. Each one's direct host defaults to its current address. Leave the extender blank to auto-detect it per device (recommended); or pin a shared extender host for all selected devices. You can fine-tune any of them afterwards.

discovery_confirm.title: Shelly Advanced
discovery_confirm.description: Add **{name}** to Shelly Advanced? Its address is taken from the Shelly integration, and the extender is auto-detected if it ever roams.

error.invalid_client: That config entry is not a usable Shelly device (no MAC / unique id).
error.cannot_connect_extender: Could not reach the extender Shelly's WiFi.ListAPClients endpoint.

abort.already_configured: This client Shelly is already being followed.
abort.no_new_shellies: All Shelly devices are already being followed.
abort.no_mac: Could not determine the Shelly's MAC address from discovery.
abort.no_shelly_entry: This Shelly is not set up in the Shelly integration yet, so there is nothing to follow.
